name: Impossible Vegetable Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cauliflower or chop the broccoli. Use a 10 oz package of frozen broccoli or cauliflower in place of fresh, thawed and drained, but do not cook first.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Lightly grease a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Heat 1 inch (2.5 cm) salted water (½ tsp salt to 1 cup water) to boiling.
5. Add broccoli and cover. Cook until tender, about 5 minutes; drain thoroughly.
6. Mix the cooked broccoli, onion, green pepper, and cheese in the pie plate.
7. Beat remaining ingredients smooth for 15 seconds on high speed.
8. Pour into the pie plate and bake until golden brown and a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean, about 35-40 minutes.
9. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting. Refrigerate any leftovers.
Note: Cook fresh broccoli or cauliflower about 7 minutes.
